answer: Five components have unhandled async operations. LoginForm.handleSubmit calls await loginUser() without try/catch — if the API rejects, the error is unhandled. CommentForm.handleSubmit calls await addComment() without try/catch. DiscussionList, TeamList, and UserProfile all use useEffect with .then() but no .catch() — if the fetch fails, the promise rejection is unhandled. Only authService.getCurrentUser has a try/catch (catches and returns null), but it is unused by any component.

ranked_files.reason: handleSubmit has await loginUser() without try/catch — user sees no error on login failure
handleSubmit has await addComment() without try/catch — user sees no error on comment failure
useEffect fetchDiscussions().then() has no .catch() — silent failure on load
useEffect fetchTeams().then() has no .catch() — silent failure on load
useEffect fetchUser().then() has no .catch() — silent failure on load

evidence.note: handleSubmit calls await loginUser without try/catch
handleSubmit calls await addComment without try/catch
